allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('groups:',[\(g['groupId'],g['playerIds']\) for g in d['groups']]\); print\('pairs/group:'\); [print\(' ',p['pairId'],p['playerIds']\) for p in d['pairs']]; print\('matches/group:'\); [print\(' ',m['matchId'],m['pair1Id'],'vs',m['pair2Id']\) for m in d['matches']]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('matches:', [\(m['matchId'], m['pair1Id'], m['pair2Id']\) for m in d['matches']]\)")
